summary: Completed testing of Admin Docs (Smart Recommendations Engine documentation) and Page CMS functionality. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend testing verified: 1) Admin Docs page loads at /admin/docs with Smart Recommendations visible in sidebar, 2) Smart Recommendations documentation displays correctly with API endpoints, breed intelligence, and code examples, 3) Page CMS loads correctly with Core Pages, 12 Pillars, Legal, and Other sections, 4) Page CMS save/load mechanism works end-to-end (tested by editing Homepage hero title and verifying persistence).

admin_docs_page_loads.details: Admin Docs page loads at /admin/docs with proper navigation sidebar

smart_recommendations_in_sidebar.details: Smart Recommendations 🆕 item visible in Core Tools section of sidebar

smart_recommendations_documentation.details: Documentation displays correctly with: Title 'Smart Recommendations Engine', Subtitle 'AI-Powered Personalized Product & Service Recommendations', Recommendation Types table, Breed Intelligence section (10+ breeds), API Endpoints (/api/smart/recommendations, /api/smart/mira-context, /api/smart/birthday-reminders), Product Matching Logic, Allergy Filtering, Mira AI Integration, Frontend Display (MiraPicksCard)

page_cms_loads.details: Page CMS loads at Admin > Page CMS with Content Manager interface

page_cms_sidebar_sections.details: Sidebar shows: CORE PAGES (Homepage, About Us, Pet Life Pass), 12 PILLARS (Celebrate, Dine, Travel, Stay, Care, Enjoy, Fit, Advisory, Emergency, Paperwork, Shop Assist, Club), LEGAL (Terms & Conditions, Privacy Policy, Refund Policy), OTHER (FAQs, Contact)

page_cms_hero_editor.details: Hero Section editor displays with editable fields: Badge Text, Main Title, Highlight, Subtitle, Primary CTA, Secondary CTA

page_cms_save_changes.details: Tested by editing Homepage hero title to 'Test Title - 423188' and clicking Save Changes. Content persisted to database.

page_cms_persistence.details: Verified via API GET /api/admin/pages/home - returned saved content with title 'Test Title - 423188'

backend_api_get_pages.details: GET /api/admin/pages returns list of pages with total count

backend_api_get_page_slug.details: GET /api/admin/pages/{slug} returns page content for existing pages

critical_code_review_comments: Smart Recommendations Engine documentation is comprehensive with API endpoints, breed intelligence, product matching logic, and code examples.
Page CMS correctly implements CRUD operations with proper authentication.
All 12 pillar pages are accessible via the Page CMS API.
Save/load mechanism works end-to-end with proper database persistence.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Docs page at /admin/docs contains comprehensive documentation for Smart Recommendations Engine. Page CMS is accessible via Admin panel > Page CMS button. The CMS supports editing Core Pages (Homepage, About Us, Pet Life Pass), 12 Pillars, Legal pages, and Other pages. Save/load mechanism works correctly with database persistence.

verified_features.admin_docs_smart_engine: VERIFIED - Documentation visible and complete with API endpoints, breed intelligence, product matching, allergy filtering, and Mira AI integration sections
verified_features.page_cms_core_pages: VERIFIED - Homepage, About Us, Pet Life Pass accessible and editable
verified_features.page_cms_12_pillars: VERIFIED - All 12 pillar pages (Celebrate, Dine, Travel, Stay, Care, Enjoy, Fit, Advisory, Emergency, Paperwork, Shop Assist, Club) accessible
verified_features.page_cms_save_load: VERIFIED - Content saves to database and persists across page reloads
verified_features.page_cms_hero_editor: VERIFIED - Hero Section editor with Badge Text, Main Title, Highlight, Subtitle, Primary CTA, Secondary CTA fields
